description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender, upright human form. The figure is extremely minimalistic, with only a thin vertical line suggesting the body and a faint, narrow extension at the top that could indicate the head. There are no visible limbs, facial features, or clothing details, making the silhouette highly abstract. The overall shape is elongated and linear, with no discernible bulk or volume. The asset appears to be entirely monochromatic and lacks any surface texture or detail. Its simplicity suggests it is a placeholder or stylized representation of a person rather than a realistic depiction.
description: A highly abstract, slender adult pedestrian figure with a minimalistic, linear silhouette and no visible features or details.
description_view_0: A thin vertical line is visible, representing the body in a front-facing, featureless pose.
description_view_1: The figure appears as a narrow diagonal line, emphasizing its extreme thinness from the side.
description_view_2: The same thin vertical line is seen, mirroring the front view with no additional features.
description_view_3: A faint diagonal line is visible, similar to the side view, highlighting the lack of width or depth.
attribute_clothing_type: formless, unidentifiable garment with no visible style or features
